description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel, reminiscent of mid-20th-century military or hunting rifles. The stock is made from polished wood, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a subtle grain pattern. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, likely blued steel, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, both mounted directly on the barrel. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver, with the magazine appearing to be internal. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, with no visible attachments or modern tactical features.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long blued steel barrel, and iron sights. The design is streamlined and traditional, with an internal magazine and no modern attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the rounded end of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden stock, barrel, and iron sights, with the bolt and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, showing the rifle's symmetry.
